response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a looped promotional clip. 2. Identified the song title 'Hyper Jumpin'' from on-screen text during the performance sections. 3. Used web search to confirm the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' is by hololive 5th generation and found the Japanese lyrics on Genius. 4. Translated the lyrics for the 'reference_lyrics_en' field. 5. Mapped the scenes Chronologically, separating the promotional slides from the performance segments. 6. Constructed the final JSON response with the song metadata, performers, and lyrics. Search string used: '"Hyper Jumpin'" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the 'Hololive 5th Generation Neopora Live Re:VISION' event, presented twice in the video. It includes informational slides about event access, merchandise, and a performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the hololive 5th generation members (Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, and Omaru Polka).

scenes.description: Informational slides regarding the Hololive event and participation methods.
Performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by hololive 5th generation.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin', 飛び出そう Come on baby
輝いて ハートきゅんって pump it up
Hyper jumpin', 夢の先まで
もっと もっと 刺激が欲しいの
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin'
子どもくらい はしゃぐ方がお徳でしょ
低気圧から這い上がっていくテンション
酔いながら打ち返しまくるメンション
カートを乗りこなして進むミッション
このままスピード加速して
たどり着く先に 何があるんだろう
止まらない気持ちは助走つけて
次元を超えて行こう (さぁ)
Hyper jumpin', 飛び跳ねよう
ハイになって灰になるまで
ダンシング Shake it up
Hyper jumpin', 空の向こうまで
もっと もっと 近づきたいの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper jumpin' now, Hyper jumpin' now
Let's jump out, Come on baby
Shine, Heart pitter-patter, Pump it up
Hyper jumpin', Beyond the dreams
More, more, I want stimulation
Hyper jumpin' now, Hyper jumpin'
It's more profitable to act like a child, right?
Tension climbing up from low pressure
Giving returns while drunk, Mensions
Mission progressing while mastering the cart
Accelerating speed just like this
I wonder what's at the place I arrive at
The unstoppable feelings, taking a run-up
Let's go beyond the dimensions (Come on)
Hyper jumpin', Let's jump
Until I'm high and turn to ash, Dancing, Shake it up
Hyper jumpin', To beyond the sky
More, more, I want to get closer
